description:
This quiz assesses fundamental SQL querying skills, emphasizing raw query construction versus ORM reliance. It is positioned at an intermediate difficulty level with a supportive, encouraging tone that nudges developers to refresh core database knowledge. The questions are concise, practical, and aimed at reinforcing confidence in writing SQL directly.
Topics: SQL SELECT statements, WHERE clauses and filtering, JOIN operations, Aggregation functions, Query optimization basics
Audience: Software developers who regularly use ORMs and want to solidify their underlying SQL knowledge, as well as intermediate-level programmers preparing for technical interviews.
